Fix all remaining QA bugs: bottom nav, unit conversion, provider icons, polish

Mobile UX:

- BUG-0273: Add scroll affordance fade gradient on mobile
- BUG-0256: Fix badge alignment on multi-line biomarker rows

Biomarkers:
- BUG-0127: Show "last updated" date per biomarker category
- BUG-0128: Show biomarker count indicator

Profile:
- BUG-0148: Add metric/imperial unit conversion toggle for height/weight
- BUG-0146/0272: Normalize BMI field styling to match other inputs
- BUG-0100: Add tooltip to blood type badge on dashboard

Login:
- BUG-0235: Separate language selector from server status indicator
- BUG-0238: Fix background gradient coverage
- BUG-0241: Use consistent HeartPulse logo icon (matches sidebar)

Billing & Family:
- BUG-0173: Add billing history section with empty state
- BUG-0290: Change free plan icon from Sparkles to Gift
- BUG-0180: Add "Premium feature" badge on Family page
- BUG-0181: Add breadcrumb navigation on Family page

Linked Accounts:
- BUG-0219: Unique icons per provider (Heart, Flask, Stethoscope, Hospital)
- BUG-0223: Fix provider badge vertical alignment

Screenings:
- BUG-0190: Add loading spinner to "Get Recommendations" button
- BUG-0210: Use skeleton loading states on Screenings and LinkedAccounts

Other:
- BUG-0280: Add clarifying title to notification settings bell icon
- BUG-0301: Balance cookie consent icon padding
- BUG-0302: Add cookie consent duration note (12 months)
- BUG-0327: Add noindex meta tag to 404 page

commit.message:
fix: unsloth互換のためfrom_generator後に.map()でMappedExamplesIterableに変換

unsloth の _prepare_dataset が _ex_iterable.batch_size を参照するが、
from_generator() が生成する ExamplesIterable にはこの属性がないため
no-op の .map(batched=True) で MappedExamplesIterable に変換する。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add code-reviewer, frontend-tester agents, enhance and frontend-design skills, Stop hook auto-advance, and deeper analysis dimensions

- Add code-reviewer agent: auto-reviews test and impl code quality, fixes issues
- Add frontend-tester agent: Playwright-based visual testing of every page at 3 breakpoints
- Add enhance skill: expands requirements with competitive feature analysis, backtracking to differentiation
- Add frontend-design skill: distinctive UI creation with Playwright verification
- Add Stop hook (pipeline-advance): code-level mechanism to force pipeline continuation
- Deepen spark/research/differentiation with business model, growth strategy, compliance dimensions
- Update pipeline: spark → research → differentiation → enhance → differentiation → scope-planning → user-story → design-doc → frontend-design → tdd-testing → impl → test-report → launch
- Bump version to 0.5.0

commit.message:
fix: use hand-written CJS preload to avoid ESM build issues

vite-plugin-electron generates ESM import/export in preload output
even with format:'cjs', breaking Electron's sandbox. Replaced with
a hand-written pure CJS preload file tracked in git, and removed
the preload entry from vite.config.ts.

refactor: SFTTrainer互換のHFIterableDatasetに変更し、バックグラウンドプリフェッチを維持

- PyTorch IterableDataset (SFTStreamDataset/InterleavedDataset) を削除
- HFIterableDataset.from_generator() に置き換え（.map()互換でunsloth対応）
- SFTデータのバックグラウンド100件ずつプリフェッチはジェネレーター内スレッドで維持
- max_steps をSFT上限ベースで再計算

commit.message:
fix: detect XObject images missed by block-type extraction

PyMuPDF's get_text("dict") only returns inline image blocks (type=1).
Many PDFs embed images as XObject references that don't appear as blocks.
Now uses page.get_images() as fallback to detect these, creating Figure
tags for images >50px that would otherwise be invisible to the tag tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Verus verification passing + Kani harnesses for FFI

Verus fixes (41 verified, 0 errors):
- Add Copy/Clone derives for Thread, ThreadId, ThreadState, Priority
  (required for array element manipulation without &mut indexing)
- Make struct fields pub (required for pub open spec fn access)
- Replace == with === for enum equality in spec contexts
- Use matches!() for exec-context enum comparison
- Replace core::mem::replace with direct copy + clear pattern
- Add decreases clauses to all loops for termination proofs
- Mark unpend_first/pend/unpend_all as external_body (array shift
  proofs deferred; specs verified at Semaphore call sites)

FFI Kani bounded model checking (6 harnesses):
- init_validates_all_params: exhaustive parameter validation
- give_no_overflow: no overflow + saturation correctness
- take_no_underflow: no underflow + correct return codes
- take_null_returns_einval: null pointer safety
- give_take_roundtrip: compositional correctness
- repeated_give_saturates: saturation under repeated gives

BUILD.bazel: add kani_ffi_test target, fix bench_test duplicate srcs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(enrichment): persist answers to Dexie content on each answer, not just at graduation

Enrichment answers were only written to inbox item content during graduation
(via appendEnrichment in graduation.ts). If the user closed the wizard before
graduating, answers lived only in the in-memory SolidJS signal and were lost.
On re-enrichment, parseEnrichment found no separator in content and asked all
questions again.

Now handleEnrichmentAnswer rebuilds enriched content from original + all
answers after each answer and persists to Dexie immediately. On re-open,
createEnrichmentSession finds existing enrichments and skips answered categories.

Implement LawDocs MVP - legal document automation SaaS

Full-stack implementation of LawDocs, a subscription SaaS for Korean law firms
that automates personal rehabilitation/bankruptcy document generation.

Frontend (React 18 + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS):
- Firebase Auth login/signup with 14-day PRO trial
- Client CRUD with debt/asset management and real-time repayment calculator
- CODEF 4-step financial data collection flow
- DOCX/HWPX document generation with A4 preview
- Dashboard with KPI cards and client pipeline
- Liquidation value report (PRO+)
- Subscription plan management (STARTER/PRO/ENTERPRISE)
- Property and vehicle auto-lookup with public data APIs

Cloudflare Worker API (Hono framework):
- Firebase JWT verification middleware
- CODEF financial data proxy with KV token caching
- Public data proxy (property/vehicle valuation)
- DOCX (docxtemplater) and HWPX (JSZip XML) document generators
- R2 storage for generated documents

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Migrate unified channel

* feat(types): add ChannelOptions, ChannelScope, and ChannelFlow types

* feat(channel): create unified Channel class with scope and flow options

- Added new Channel<T> class that extends BaseChannel<T>
- Supports configurable scope ('broadcast' | 'subscribers') and flow ('bidirectional' | 'send-only' | 'receive-only')
- Validates invalid combinations (broadcast scope requires send-only flow)
- Implements conditional methods that throw errors when used in wrong mode
  - subscribe/unsubscribe/hasSubscriber/getSubscribers throw if scope is 'broadcast'
  - onMessage throws if flow is 'send-only'
- Supports auto-relay (no handlers) and intercept mode (with handlers)
- getTargetClients() returns all clients for 'broadcast', subscribers for 'subscribers'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(server): add createChannel() and broadcast() methods

- Add createChannel<T>() method for unified channel creation with configurable scope and flow
- Add broadcast<T>() convenience method for one-off broadcasts to all clients
- Import Channel from channel-new and ChannelOptions from types
- Import IPublishOptions from channel for broadcast method

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(server): deprecate createBroadcast() and createMulticast() methods

* feat(exports): add Channel export, deprecate BroadcastChannel and MulticastChannel

* test: add comprehensive tests for unified Channel class

* test: add tests for createChannel() and broadcast() methods

* refactor(channel): remove unnecessary reserved channel name check

* docs: update README with unified channel API examples

* docs: add migration guide for unified channel API

* refactor(channel): finalize unified channel implementation

- Add re-export of unified Channel class from channel-new.ts at end of channel.ts
- This completes Phase 7, Task 11 of the unified channel API implementation
- The new Channel class provides a single API for both broadcast and multicast modes
- Old BroadcastChannel and MulticastChannel classes remain for backward compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: bump version to 2.0.0-alpha.1 for unified channel API

* refactor: remove all deprecated code (BroadcastChannel, MulticastChannel)

This commit removes all deprecated code from the unified channel API implementation:
- Removed BroadcastChannel class from src/channel.ts
- Removed MulticastChannel class and MulticastChannelOptions interface from src/channel.ts
- Removed createBroadcast() and createMulticast() methods from src/server.ts
- Removed broadcastChannel property from SyncarServer class
- Removed exports of deprecated classes from src/index.ts
- Removed __tests__/channel.test.ts (tests for deprecated classes)
- Updated tests in __tests__/server.test.ts to use createChannel() instead
- Updated tests in __tests__/index.test.ts to remove references to deprecated classes
- Updated README.md to use the new unified API throughout
- Cleaned up unused imports in src/channel.ts

All tests pass and build succeeds. The codebase now has a clean unified channel API.

* refactor(channel): merge channel-new.ts into channel.ts

* fomat files

fix: fallback to direct content fetch when Convex returns 500

(e.g. invalid storage ID for raw content), fall back to fetching the
listing data directly and returning fileStorageId as content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite LCD driver with layered architecture and configurable GPIO

- Replace monolithic lcd_mc.h/lcd_bm.c with a three-layer driver:
  Layer 1 (gpio.c/h): GPIO pin control and timing
  Layer 2 (lcd.c, static): 4-bit bus protocol, nibble/byte transfers
  Layer 3 (lcd.c public / lcd.h): HD44780 API (init, clear, print, cursor)

- Add gpio_setup() so callers configure port/pin mapping at runtime
  instead of hardcoded registers; derives DDR from PORT (PORT-1 on AVR)

- Implement correct HD44780 4-bit init sequence: three 8-bit reset
  nibbles via lcd_bus_send_nibble(), then switch to 4-bit mode, then
  full Function Set / Display OFF / Clear / Entry Mode / Display ON

- Add complete HD44780 command macro set with composable option bits

- Fix delay_us/delay_ms to loop on constant 1 to satisfy AVR
  __builtin_avr_delay_cycles compile-time constant requirement

- Update Makefile for separate compile/link steps across all three
  source files; fix compile_commands target infinite-loop bug

- Add -D__AVR_ATmega328P__ to .clangd to restore register definitions
  lost when -mmcu=* is stripped for clangd compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix compat header: only neutralize _stdcall, not __stdcall

The previous fix defined __stdcall as empty, which broke WINAPI/CALLBACK
in all Windows system headers (winsvc.h, imm.h, etc.). The actual issue
is that ONNX Runtime uses _stdcall (single underscore, MSVC-only keyword)
which MinGW/GCC doesn't recognize. Only neutralize _stdcall, leaving
__stdcall (used by system headers) untouched.
